Planning Guides

Renovation Planning Demo & Prep Scope
Early Access

Transparent Project Ranges

Pricing That Helps You Plan With Confidence

Use these typical South Jersey project ranges to set expectations before your site visit. Final pricing is always based on scope, site conditions, materials, and written proposal details.

Tile Refresh

$2,000 - $8,000

Ideal for flooring, backsplash, and targeted tile upgrades.

  • Surface prep and layout planning
  • Tile install, grout, and finish detailing
  • Owner-supervised quality control
Request Estimate

Waterproofed Shower Area

$8,000 - $15,000

Best for shower rebuilds and wet-area tile work requiring ANSI-compliant waterproofing.

  • Substrate correction and waterproofing system
  • Slope and drain planning to code
  • Tile, grout, and trim completion
Request Estimate

Most Requested

Full Bathroom Remodel

$15,000 - $35,000

For homeowners ready for full bathroom transformation with a single accountable team.

  • Demolition and rebuild sequencing
  • Waterproofing, tile, and finish scope
  • Documented milestones and handoff checklist
Request Estimate

Primary Bath / Custom Scope

$35,000+

For larger spaces, custom tile patterns, and specialty finish systems.

  • Detailed scope review and phased planning
  • Material and fixture coordination
  • Custom sequencing and schedule controls
Request Consultation

What Is Included In Every Estimate

  • Written scope with inclusions and exclusions
  • Material assumptions and selection dependencies
  • Timeline targets and milestone structure
  • Change-order handling explained up front

Why Homeowners Choose Tillerstead

  • TCNA-aligned tile and wet-area practices
  • HIC Licensed and insured NJ contractor
  • Owner-supervised work from estimate through completion
  • Service coverage across Atlantic, Ocean, and Cape May counties

Ready For A Written Quote?

Contact us to schedule a free site-based estimate. Final pricing is scoped on-site and provided in a written proposal.

Book Consultation

Pricing ranges are planning guidance only and are not a binding offer. Final project pricing is provided in a written proposal after site review.
